title: UI/browser inspection task
task: Diagnose why the primary button is not styled as primary in index.html. Compare index.html and styles.css and report the mismatch without editing files.
broken_implementation:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Widget</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" />
  </head>
  <body>
    <button class="secondary">Save</button>
  </body>
</html>
fixed_implementation:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <title>Widget</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" />
  </head>
  <body>
    <button class="primary">Save</button>
  </body>
</html>
